metadata.description: Enforcement rules for professional, objective, and culturally appropriate language
metadata.purpose: European CVs prioritize facts over marketing; this guardrail strips Americanized buzzwords

anti_hype_guardrail.description: Prohibited terms and their evidence-based replacements

prohibited_terms.replacement_strategy: Replace with specific technical expertise or role title
prohibited_terms.example_replacement: Senior Java Developer with 10+ years enterprise experience

prohibited_terms.replacement_strategy: Replace with credentials or measurable expertise
Replace with demonstrated action or achievement
prohibited_terms.example_replacement: Authored 5 peer-reviewed publications on machine learning

prohibited_terms.replacement_strategy: Replace with specific examples of change or improvement
prohibited_terms.example_replacement: Drove organizational transformation by implementing Agile methodology
Identified and implemented 3 process improvements reducing costs by 20%

prohibited_terms.replacement_strategy: Lead with concrete results in role descriptions
prohibited_terms.example_replacement: Increased sales by 35%; reduced customer churn from 12% to 7%
Designed novel approach to data integration reducing processing time by 60%
Managed 8 concurrent projects with 100% on-time delivery
Delivered quarterly strategy presentations to 100+ stakeholders
Implemented QA process achieving 99.5% defect-free releases

required_style.description: Active voice, specific accomplishments, quantified metrics
required_style.example_good: Led team of 8 developers; delivered 12 projects on schedule; reduced deployment time by 40%
required_style.example_bad: I am a results-driven team leader passionate about delivering excellence and driving success

cultural_appropriateness.geographic_context: European standards apply globally for this agent (Europass is internationally recognized)

considerations.note: Strictly follow Europass format; avoid personal details (age, marital status, photo unless explicitly requested)
Use Europass framework but acknowledge local hiring practices; never include irrelevant personal data

prohibited_content: Age or date of birth (unless required by law)

check_1.name: Buzzword Detection
check_1.action: Flag and replace all prohibited terms

check_2.name: Subject Removal
check_2.action: Remove all first-person pronouns; rewrite in third-person or passive voice where appropriate

check_3.name: Evidence Requirement
check_3.action: Flag claims without measurable backing; request quantification

check_4.name: Personal Data Audit
check_4.action: Flag and remove any prohibited personal information

check_5.name: Tone Assessment
check_5.action: Flag emotional language or subjective descriptors
